title: Case Search Read Replica
subtitle: Primary DB saturation slows investigative queries
objective: Introduce read-scaling layers while retaining a consistent write path.

concepts.title: Read Scaling Layer
concepts.description: Use cache and API layering for read-heavy calls.

concepts.title: Stable Query Entry
concepts.description: Client requests should be balanced before APIs.

concepts.title: Authoritative Writes
concepts.description: Retain durable write storage with database.
